svg.text: In-order traversal of a BST yields a sorted sequence.
For each node: left subtree values < node < right subtree values.
search, insert, delete in O(h). Balanced ⟹ O(log n); skewed ⟹ O(n).
Common variants: AVL, Red-Black, Treap, Splay (self-balancing).
Java TreeMap, C++ std::map, Python sortedcontainers — all balanced BST or skip list.
recurse left and right; if both non-null return current; else return non-null child
if both targets < node ⟹ recurse left; both > ⟹ right; else current is LCA
BST exploits ordering for O(h) without subtree search.
